hero.subtitle: We design and implement advanced agentic systems, intelligent automation, and AI-first software that redefines your business efficiency.

services.label: Services
services.title: Comprehensive Technological Solutions
services.description: From strategy to implementation — we provide a full range of software engineering services.

agents.title: AI Agents & Autonomous Workflows
agents.description: Intelligent agentic systems that plan and execute complex business processes independently.
agents.full_text: We design and deploy advanced agentic systems based on Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) architectures. Our solutions can autonomously manage tasks ranging from customer support to complex market analysis.

llm.title: LLM & Semantic Search
llm.description: Unlock the power of large language models for document analysis and intuitive information retrieval.
llm.full_text: We build RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems that allow AI models to interact with your private data securely and accurately. No more hallucinations.

automation.title: Intelligent Process Automation
automation.description: Eliminate repetitive tasks with AI-powered bots and highly efficient workflows.
automation.full_text: We combine traditional RPA with state-of-the-art AI, creating systems that don't just follow steps but understand the data they process. Automated emails, invoices, and databases.

web.title: Modern Web Applications
web.description: Fast, scalable, and secure web platforms with native AI module integration.
web.full_text: We build custom SaaS products and enterprise platforms designed from ground-up to leverage AI. We prioritize high performance and exceptional user experience.

mobile.title: AI-Driven Mobile Apps
mobile.description: Next-gen mobile experiences featuring on-device models and intelligent UX.
mobile.full_text: We deliver iOS and Android apps that utilize local processing for vision, speech, and text. Your app stays smart even without an active internet connection.

security.title: Security Audit & Pentesting
security.description: Comprehensive analysis of your apps, infra, and AI models to prevent data breaches.
security.full_text: Security is a continuous journey. We perform deep penetration testing, source code audits, and probe AI systems for vulnerabilities like prompt injection.

infra.title: AI Infrastructure & MLOps
infra.description: Scalable cloud environments optimized for training and serving AI models.
infra.full_text: We provide efficiency and cost-savings through precise hardware management. We implement robust monitoring for models in production (MLOps).

security_audit.label: Security Audit
security_audit.description: We identify vulnerabilities before others do. Our audits combine manual expert analysis with automated AI-driven testing.

pentests.title: Penetration Testing
pentests.desc: Real-world attack simulations on your web and mobile applications.

code.title: Security Code Review
code.desc: Deep dive into your source code to find logic flaws and vulnerabilities.

cloud.title: Infrastructure & Cloud
cloud.desc: Securing AWS/Azure/GCP configurations and Kubernetes clusters.

ai.title: AI Model Security
ai.desc: Protection against prompt injection and data leakage in LLM systems.

about.label: About Us
about.title: A Partner That {{gradient}}
about.description: We specialize in building web, mobile, SaaS, and AI solutions for leading technology companies from Europe and the USA. Since 2016, we have been providing software engineering at the highest level.

features.f1_desc: 80% of engineers with 4+ years of commercial experience.
features.f2_desc: Project start within 2 weeks of inquiry.
features.f3_desc: Flexible teams ready for rapid product scaling.

tech.label: Technologies
tech.title: Our Tech Stack
tech.description: We work with cutting-edge technologies to deliver efficient and scalable solutions.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.title: AI Innovations in Practice
portfolio.description: From agentic systems to advanced analytics — see how we implement AI solutions that bring real value.

engineer.title: Autonomous AI Engineer
engineer.description: An AI agent integrating with code repositories, capable of independently fixing bugs, writing tests, and refactoring complex modules.
engineer.full_text: We developed a next-generation AI agent designed to function as a senior software engineer. This system doesn't just suggest code; it understands entire codebases, identifies technical debt, and executes complex refactoring tasks autonomously.
engineer.challenge: Manual code review and bug fixing consume up to 40% of developer time in large-scale projects, slowing down feature delivery and increasing costs.
engineer.solution: Implementation of a multi-agent system utilizing RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and autonomous reasoning loops to plan and execute codebase modifications.

travel.title: AI Travel Agent
travel.description: A conversational travel agent planning complete itineraries, booking hotels, and reacting in real-time to flight changes.
travel.full_text: AI Travel Agent is a comprehensive concierge system that redefines the travel planning experience. By leveraging real-time data and user preferences, it acts as a proactive personal assistant throughout the entire journey.
travel.challenge: Travelers face decision fatigue and complex logistics when planning multi-destination trips across different time zones and booking systems.
travel.solution: A conversational AI interface with 'tool-calling' capabilities to book flights, hotels, and restaurants while maintaining context-aware memory.

finance.title: Predictive Financial Analytics
finance.description: A SaaS platform predicting market trends and optimizing investment portfolios using advanced neural networks.
finance.full_text: This platform provides institutional-grade financial analysis to individual investors. Using advanced machine learning models, it identifies patterns in market volatility that traditional algorithms miss.
finance.challenge: High market volatility and the volume of financial data make it difficult for investors to identify reliable signals and manage risk effectively.
finance.solution: Neural network architectures optimized for time-series forecasting, integrated with global news sentiment analysis for a holistic market view.

medical.title: AI Imaging Diagnostics
medical.description: A system assisting radiologists in detecting early diseased lesions on CT and MRI images with over 98% accuracy.
medical.full_text: Our AI Medical Imaging solution serves as a second pair of expert eyes for radiologists, drastically reducing the time required for initial scan review while improving detection rates for critical conditions.
medical.challenge: Overworked radiologists and high volume of imaging data can lead to diagnostic delays or micro-omissions in early-stage disease detection.
medical.solution: Custom Computer Vision models trained on specialized clinical datasets, designed for seamless integration with existing hospital PACS systems.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.description: Our clients' trust is our greatest achievement.

t1.quote: I have been working with ImproveIT for over 3 years. The team is highly motivated, committed, and professional. I highly recommend them!

t2.quote: The team is very agile and punctual. Our stakeholders are particularly impressed with the quality of the solutions delivered.

t3.quote: Working with ImproveIT is a pure pleasure. The team delivered a top-level solution and constantly improved our application.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Project
contact.description: Describe your needs — we will respond within 24 hours with a collaboration proposal tailored to your budget and goals.
contact.info_text: We are ready to help you build a digital product, extend your engineering team, or optimize existing solutions.

post1.excerpt: How agentic systems are redefining how companies approach complex problems.
